name: Cherry Vanilla Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, cream, milk, corn syrup, and butter in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to boiling.
3. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until a candy thermometer reaches 238°F (soft-ball stage).
4. Remove from heat, leaving the thermometer in the saucepan. Allow it to cool to 100°F.
5. Add vanilla and beat briskly until the fudge thickens and begins to lose its gloss. Stir in cherries.
6. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan. Cool and cut into squares when firm.
Makes 1 3/4 pounds.
